# Vendored SVD Files

## esp32s3.svd

**Source:** https://github.com/espressif/svd — `esp32s3.svd`
**License:** Apache-2.0 / MIT (Espressif Systems)
**Why vendored:** CI runs without PlatformIO or the Xtensa toolchain. The SVD
coverage ratchet (`crates/cli/tests/svd_coverage_ratchet.rs`) needs the file
to actually execute rather than silently skip. Vendoring here keeps the ratchet
armed in every CI run with zero toolchain dependency.

Do not edit this file manually. To refresh it, copy from
`~/.platformio/platforms/espressif32/misc/svd/esp32s3.svd` and verify the SHA
matches the upstream espressif/svd repository.
